name: Strawberry Shortcake (Weight Watchers Magazin
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Reduced-calorie nondairy whipped topping (8 calories per tablespoon)
recipeInstructions:
Adapted from the Kingdome, Seattle, WA. Foodservice: Ogden Entertainment Services.
Serves: 12
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. In a large bowl, with electric mixer on high speed, beat egg whites until foamy. Add cream of tartar and vanilla. Gradually beat in 1/4 cup + 2 tablespoons sugar until stiff peaks form (about 10 minutes).
3. Gradually sift cake flour and baking powder over egg white mixture; gently fold in until no white streaks remain.
4. Spoon batter evenly into a 9-inch tube pan. Bake for 35-40 minutes, or until the cake springs back when lightly touched with a fingertip. Invert immediately and let cool completely.
5. Meanwhile, in a medium bowl, combine strawberries with remaining 2 tablespoons sugar; set aside for 15 minutes.
6. To serve, cut cake into 12 pieces with a serrated knife. Place on serving plates. Top each piece with equal amounts of strawberries with accumulated juice and 1 tablespoon whipped topping.
Each serving provides: 1/4 P, 1/2 B, 1/2 FR, 50 C.
Per serving: 106 cal, 4 g protein, 1 g fat, 21 g carbs, 42 mg sodium, 0 mg cholesterol.
